---
title: "Assignment 3 - February 19th, 2026"
subtitle: "Information Management"
format: html
---

**Task One: Write SQL codes to get a list of:** **Students, Instructors, & Departments**

SQL CODE:

``` sql
SELECT DISTINCT *
FROM student;

SELECT *
FROM instructor;

SELECT *
FROM department;
```

RESULT:

<details>

<summary><strong>Or Click to Show/Hide Result</strong></summary>

<iframe src="6354-A3-1.png" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none; margin-top: 1em;">

</iframe>

</details>

**Task Two: Write SQL codes to do following queries:** i. Find the ID and name of each student who has taken at least one Comp. Sci. course; make sure there are no duplicate names in the result.

ii. Add grades to the list

iii. Find the ID and name of each student who has not taken any course offered before 2017.

iv. For each department, find the maximum salary of instructors in that department. You may assume that every department has at least one instructor.

v.  Find the lowest, across all departments, of the per-department maximum salary computed by the preceding query.

vi. Add names to the list

SQL CODE for I & II:

``` sql
SELECT s.ID,
       s.name,
       GROUP_CONCAT(t.grade, ', ') AS grades
FROM student AS s
JOIN takes  AS t ON t.ID = s.ID
JOIN course  AS c ON c.course_id = t.course_id
WHERE c.dept_name = 'Comp. Sci.'
GROUP BY s.ID, s.name;
```

RESULT for I & II:

<details>

<summary><strong>Or Click to Show/Hide Result</strong></summary>

<iframe src="6354-A3-2-1.png" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none; margin-top: 1em;">

</iframe>

</details>

SQL CODE FOR III:

``` sql
SELECT s.ID, s.name
FROM student AS s
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM takes AS t
  WHERE t.ID = s.ID
    AND t.year < 2017
);
```

RESULT FOR III:

<details>

<summary><strong>Or Click to Show/Hide Result</strong></summary>

<iframe src="6354-A3-2-3.png" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none; margin-top: 1em;">

</iframe>

</details>

SQL CODE FOR IV & VI:

``` sql
SELECT i.dept_name, i.name, i.salary
FROM instructor AS i
JOIN (
    SELECT dept_name, MAX(salary) AS max_salary
    FROM instructor
    GROUP BY dept_name
) AS dept_max
ON i.dept_name = dept_max.dept_name
AND i.salary = dept_max.max_salary;
```

RESULT FOR IV & VI:

<details>

<summary><strong>Or Click to Show/Hide Result</strong></summary>

<iframe src="6354-A3-2-4.png" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none; margin-top: 1em;">

</iframe>

</details>

SQL CODE FOR V & VI:

``` sql
SELECT i.dept_name, i.name, i.salary
FROM instructor AS i
JOIN (
    SELECT dept_name, MAX(salary) AS max_salary
    FROM instructor
    GROUP BY dept_name
    ORDER BY max_salary
    LIMIT 1
) AS dept_max
ON i.dept_name = dept_max.dept_name
AND i.salary = dept_max.max_salary;
```

RESULT FOR V & VI:

<details>

<summary><strong>Or Click to Show/Hide Result</strong></summary>

<iframe src="6354-A3-2-5.png" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none; margin-top: 1em;">

</iframe>

</details>

**Task Three: Find instructor (with name and ID) who has never given an A grade in any course she or he has taught. (Instructors who have never taught a course trivially satisfy this condition.)**

SQL CODE:

``` sql
SELECT i.ID, i.name
FROM instructor AS i
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM teaches AS te
  JOIN takes   AS ta
    ON ta.course_id = te.course_id
   AND ta.sec_id    = te.sec_id
   AND ta.semester  = te.semester
   AND ta.year      = te.year
  WHERE te.ID = i.ID
    AND ta.grade = 'A'
);
```

RESULT:

<details>

<summary><strong>Or Click to Show/Hide Result</strong></summary>

<iframe src="6354-A3-3.png" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none; margin-top: 1em;">

</iframe>

</details>

**Task Four:Write SQL query to find the number of students in each section. The result columns should appear in the order “courseid, secid, year, semester, num”. You do not need to output sections with 0 students.**

SQL CODE:

``` sql
SELECT course_id,
       sec_id,
       year,
       semester,
       COUNT(ID) AS num
FROM takes
GROUP BY course_id, sec_id, year, semester;
```

RESULT:

<details>

<summary><strong>Or Click to Show/Hide Result</strong></summary>

<iframe src="6354-A3-4.png" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none; margin-top: 1em;">

</iframe>

</details>
